positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic botanical mandala design, incorporating stylized elements of luminous galaxies, crescent moons, geometric constellations, and glowing exotic flora. The style is a fusion of detailed linework, retro-futurism, and sacred geometry, rendered in high-contrast vector art. Color palette is dominated by deep indigo, celestial violet, sapphire blue, accented by metallic gold leaf detailing and glowing neon aqua accents. The composition is perfectly central and circular, designed for optimal print placement on apparel. Use sharp edges, clean silhouettes, and luminous, ethereal glows. Cinematic studio lighting, ultra definition, tattoo art style, clean background.
